overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage following a bird of prey soaring over a vast alpine landscape. The eagle glides effortlessly above green valleys, dense forests, and snow-capped mountain peaks under a bright partly cloudy sky, showcasing the detailed open-world environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: alpine valley with snow-capped peaks on the horizon

events.description: bird banks sharply to the left, altering course toward the snow-covered mountain range

agents.ego_description: large bird of prey gliding with wings fully extended over the expansive green valley

entered.detail: majestic snow-covered peaks forming the left boundary of the valley
lush green meadows and rolling hills stretching into the distance
dense evergreen forests covering the valley floor and lower slopes
silver river meandering through the valley below

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a bird of prey gliding over a vast alpine valley. Snow-capped mountains dominate the left horizon while dense forests and green meadows fill the valley floor. Around the 10-second mark, the bird executes a sharp left bank, turning toward the mountain range while maintaining its soaring altitude.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested mountain valley with river visible below

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady altitude while soaring over dense pine forests and the winding river below

entered.detail: gray rocky terrain with sparse vegetation beginning to replace the green meadows
small dark blue lake visible in the distant valley

segments.scene_description: The bird continues its flight over increasingly forested terrain as the landscape transitions from open meadows to denser woodland. The snow-capped mountains draw closer on the left, while a small alpine lake becomes visible in the far distance. The river winds through the forest canopy below.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain slopes transitioning to high alpine terrain

agents.ego_description: gliding over increasingly rocky terrain as the landscape transitions from forest to stone

entered.detail: steep gray rock faces with patches of vegetation

segments.scene_description: The terrain below becomes significantly rockier as the bird flies over steep cliff faces and gravel slopes. The dense forest recedes to the right while the snow-capped mountains loom much closer on the left. The river is no longer visible as the landscape becomes more arid and mountainous.

scene_state.functional_zone: high alpine rocky terrain approaching snow line

agents.ego_description: soaring close to the massive snow-capped peaks with steep rocky cliffs passing immediately below

entered.detail: expansive snow-covered mountain face dominating the left side of the frame

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the bird flies extremely close to the massive snow-covered mountain peaks. Snow fields dominate the left side while steep rocky cliffs pass by directly below. The landscape is now entirely alpine with no visible forest, showcasing the stark beauty of the high mountain environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial glide that transforms from a lush alpine valley into a stark, high-altitude mountain environment. It begins with a bird of prey soaring over green meadows and dense forests with snow-capped peaks on the horizon, before executing a sharp left bank toward the mountains. As the bird continues its flight, the open meadows give way to denser woodland and a winding river, with a distant alpine lake appearing as the peaks draw closer. The scene then shifts to rockier terrain, where the forests recede to the right and are replaced by steep cliff faces and arid gravel slopes. Finally, the camera glides extremely close to the massive snow-covered summits, passing over steep rocky cliffs as the landscape becomes entirely alpine.
